description: Official-source-grounded bioinformatics workflow map for bio-agent.

workflows.title: Bulk RNA-seq differential expression

official_sources.label: Galaxy Training: RNA-seq analysis and visualization

workflows.default_request_text: Plan a bulk RNA-seq differential expression workflow with explicit QC, alignment, quantification, DE testing, and a final evidence bundle.
workflows.default_goal: Generate a staged bulk RNA-seq differential expression plan.

strategy_profiles.label: STAR + featureCounts
strategy_profiles.default_request_text: Plan a bulk RNA-seq differential expression workflow with explicit QC, alignment, quantification, DE testing, and a final evidence bundle. Use the STAR + featureCounts strategy.
strategy_profiles.default_goal: Generate a staged bulk RNA-seq differential expression plan.

strategy_profiles.label: Salmon + tximport
strategy_profiles.default_request_text: Plan a bulk RNA-seq differential expression workflow with explicit QC, alignment, quantification, DE testing, and a final evidence bundle. Use the Salmon + tximport strategy.
strategy_profiles.default_goal: Generate a staged bulk RNA-seq differential expression plan.

workflows.title: Single-cell RNA-seq preprocessing and clustering-ready matrix generation

official_sources.label: Galaxy Training: scRNA-seq with Scanpy/Seurat-style downstream

workflows.default_request_text: Plan a single-cell RNA-seq preprocessing workflow that ends with a filtered matrix, QC metrics, clustering-ready embeddings, and marker review.
workflows.default_goal: Generate a staged scRNA-seq preprocessing plan.

strategy_profiles.label: STARsolo
strategy_profiles.default_request_text: Plan a single-cell RNA-seq preprocessing workflow that ends with a filtered matrix, QC metrics, clustering-ready embeddings, and marker review. Use the STARsolo strategy.
strategy_profiles.default_goal: Generate a staged scRNA-seq preprocessing plan.

strategy_profiles.label: Cell Ranger
strategy_profiles.default_request_text: Plan a single-cell RNA-seq preprocessing workflow that ends with a filtered matrix, QC metrics, clustering-ready embeddings, and marker review. Use the Cell Ranger strategy.
strategy_profiles.default_goal: Generate a staged scRNA-seq preprocessing plan.

workflows.title: ATAC-seq peak calling and differential accessibility
workflows.default_request_text: Plan an ATAC-seq workflow from FASTQ to filtered BAMs, peak calling, consensus peak matrix, and differential accessibility report.
workflows.default_goal: Generate a staged ATAC-seq differential accessibility plan.

strategy_profiles.label: bowtie2 + MACS3
strategy_profiles.default_request_text: Plan an ATAC-seq workflow from FASTQ to filtered BAMs, peak calling, consensus peak matrix, and differential accessibility report. Use the bowtie2 + MACS3 strategy.
strategy_profiles.default_goal: Generate a staged ATAC-seq differential accessibility plan.

strategy_profiles.label: BWA + MACS3
strategy_profiles.default_request_text: Plan an ATAC-seq workflow from FASTQ to filtered BAMs, peak calling, consensus peak matrix, and differential accessibility report. Use the BWA + MACS3 strategy.
strategy_profiles.default_goal: Generate a staged ATAC-seq differential accessibility plan.

workflows.title: Germline SNP/Indel discovery for WGS/WES
workflows.default_request_text: Plan a germline short variant discovery workflow from WES or WGS reads to gVCFs, joint genotyping, filtering, and cohort review.
workflows.default_goal: Generate a staged germline short variant discovery plan.

strategy_profiles.label: BWA + GATK Hard Filter
strategy_profiles.default_request_text: Plan a germline short variant discovery workflow from WES or WGS reads to gVCFs, joint genotyping, filtering, and cohort review. Use the BWA + GATK Hard Filter strategy.
strategy_profiles.default_goal: Generate a staged germline short variant discovery plan.

strategy_profiles.label: BWA + GATK VQSR
strategy_profiles.default_request_text: Plan a germline short variant discovery workflow from WES or WGS reads to gVCFs, joint genotyping, filtering, and cohort review. Use the BWA + GATK VQSR strategy.
strategy_profiles.default_goal: Generate a staged germline short variant discovery plan.
